action.content:
Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise. At the end of your response, explicitly add a postscript starting with P.P.S

Finish your entire response with this exact phrase: Hope you agree with me.
action.label: context

action.content:
Subject: Request for Salary Review

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to take a moment to discuss my current compensation package with you. Over the past [X] months/years, I have been dedicated to my role as [Position] and have consistently delivered high-quality results while taking on additional responsibilities to support the growth and success of the company.

Some of my key achievements include:

- Successfully leading [project/initiative] which resulted in [desirable outcome]
- Developing and implementing [process/system] that has improved [aspect of business]
- Consistently meeting or exceeding performance targets, with a [percentage] increase in productivity

Given my hard work and dedication, I believe that my salary should be adjusted to reflect my value to the company. I have done some research and found that my salary is below the industry average for someone with my experience and qualifications. I am requesting a salary increase of [specific percentage or dollar amount] to bring my compensation more in line with industry standards.

I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss this request with you in more detail and explore options for a salary increase. If there is any additional information you need from me or if you would like to schedule a meeting to discuss this further, please let me know.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

P.P.S. I have attached a document outlining my achievements and the industry standards for my position, which I hope will be helpful in our discussion.

Hope you agree with me.
action.label: response
